data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for fast historical trend querying.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for fast historical trend querying without heavy cross-domain joins. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The absence of such evidence indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks for fast historical trend querying.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the fast historical trend querying requirement.
